TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Kalinku_Sakizaya_Wikipitiya_patinakay_a_sye-huy, title = Kalinku_Sakizaya_Wikipitiya_patinakay_a_sye-huy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kalinku_Sakizaya_Wikipitiya_patinakay_a_sye-huy} }

S.FORM: == nilaculan == "Kalinku Sakizaya Wikipitiya patinakay a sye-huy" patizeng tu ku nu "Kalinku Sakizaya Wikipitiya patinakay a sye-huy"
S.PHON: == nir~ɾaʦur~ɾan == "kar~ɾinku sakizaja wikipitija patinakaj a sjə-ħuj" patizəŋ tu ku nu "kar~ɾinku sakizaja wikipitija patinakaj a sjə-ħuj"
S.FORM: == nilaculan == "Kalinku Sakizaya Wikipitiya patinakay a sye-huy" patizeng tu ku nu "Kalinku Sakizaya Wikipitiya patinakay a sye-huy"
S.PHON: == nir~ɾaʦur~ɾan == "kar~ɾinku sakizaja wikipitija patinakaj a sjə-ħuj" patizəŋ tu ku nu "kar~ɾinku sakizaja wikipitija patinakaj a sjə-ħuj"
